name: Dumbo
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
AERIAL DUO When you play this character, chosen character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn.

name: Alice
text:
WASHED AWAY When you play this character, you may put chosen item into its player's inkwell facedown and exerted.
MAKING WAVES Whenever this character quests, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.

name: The Queen
text:
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
ROYAL SUMMONS At the start of your turn, you may choose and discard a Princess or Queen character card to return a character card from your discard to your hand.

name: Maleficent
text: DRAGON FIRE When you play this character, you may banish chosen character.
flavor_text: The ninth Rule of Villainy: When all else fails, turn into a dragon.

name: Maleficent
text: DRAGON FIRE When you play this character, you may banish chosen character.

name: Elsa
text:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
CRYSTALLIZE When you play this character, exert chosen opposing character.

name: Cursed Merfolk
text: POOR SOULS Whenever this character is challenged, each opponent chooses and discards a card.
flavor_text:
"Now it's happened once or twice, someone couldn't pay the price..."
—Ursula

name: Strength of a Raging Fire
text:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Deal damage to chosen character equal to the number of characters you have in play.
flavor_text:
Tranquil as a forest
But on fire within

name: Sisu
text:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
BRING ON THE HEAT! When you play this character, banish chosen opposing character with 1 {S} or less.
flavor_text: "Come on—what's the worst that can happen?"

name: Mickey Mouse
flavor_text:
As long as he's around, newcomers to the Great
Illuminariy will always get a warm welcome.

name: Tinker Bell
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Tinker Bell.)
ROCK THE BOAT When you play this character, deal 1 damage to each opposing character.
PUN PIRATE! During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, you may deal 2 damage to chosen opposing character.

name: The Queen
text: CALCULATING AND VAIN Whenever this character quests, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and put them back in any order.
flavor_text: She has only one question, and she'd better like the answer.

name: Mickey Mouse
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mickey Mouse.)
MARINER'S MIGHT Whenever this character quests, chosen Pirate character gets +2 {S} and gains "This character takes no damage from challenges" this turn.

name: Goofy
text:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)
CLEVER DESIGN Whenever this character quests, chosen character gains Ward until the start of your next turn.

name: Donald Duck
text: BOARDING PARTY During your turn, whenever this character banishes another character in a challenge, your other characters get +1 {L} this turn.
flavor_text: Nobody stands a chance against the daring duck of the high seas!

name: Daisy Duck
text: DISTANT SHORES Whenever one of your Pirate characters quests while at a location, draw a card.
flavor_text: "The answers we're looking for are on the other side of that maze, I just know it!"

name: Minnie Mouse
text: LAND, HO! Once during your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may return a location card from your discard to your hand.
flavor_text: Minnie leaned forward. Could it be true? Was this the island at last?

name: Zeus
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
I NEED MORE THUNDERBOLTS! While there’s a card under this character, he gets +2 {S} and +2 {W}.

name: The Great Illuminary
text: STARTLING DISCOVERY Characters gain " — Draw a card" while here.
flavor_text: Remember, we're looking for clues to who tore up the lorebook pages. —Elisa Maza

name: The Horseman Strikes!
text: Draw a card. You may banish chosen character with Evasive.
flavor_text: Just when you thought you'd escaped...

name: Scar
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
SURVIVAL OF THE FITTEST Whenever you put a card under this character, chosen opposing character gets -5 {S} this turn.

name: Elsa
text: CLOSER LOOK When you play this character, you may draw a card.
flavor_text: "This world still has secrets to uncover."

name: Daisy Duck
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Daisy Duck.)
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
STRANGE HAPPENINGS While this character is exerted, cards enter opponents' inkwells exerted.

name: Daisy Duck
text:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Daisy Duck.)
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
STRANGE HAPPENINGS While this character is exerted, cards enter opponents' inkwells exerted.

name: Goofy
text:
EVEN THE SCORE Whenever one of your other Emerald characters is challenged and banished, banish the challenging character.
PROVIDE COVER Your other Emerald characters gain Ward. (Opponents can’t choose them except to challenge.)

name: Jasmine
text:
Boost 2 {I} (Once during your turn, you may pay 2 {I} to put the top card of your deck facedown under this character.)
UPLIFTING AURA Whenever this character quests, if there’s a card under her, remove up to 3 damage from each of your characters.

name: Putting It All Together
text: Chosen opposing character can't challenge during their next turn. Draw a card.
flavor_text:
"Stop! It's Hopps and Wilde! We have questions!"
—Judy Hopps

name: Gramma Tala
text: ANCESTORS' GIFT For each card in your inkwell, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
flavor_text: "Ice fishing? No, no—this is ice feeding!"

name: White Rabbit
text:
UNDERDOG If this is your first turn and you're not the first player, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

name: Elisa Maza
text:
FOREVER STRONG Your characters' {S} can't be reduced below their printed value.
STONE BY DAY If you have 3 or more cards in your hand, this character can't ready.
flavor_text: "I'll never get the hang of jumping off rooftops."

name: Beast
text:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
DYNAMIC MANEUVER Whenever this character challenges, if he’s at a location, he takes no damage from the challenge.

name: Timon
text: GET RID OF THAT When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards a non-character card of your choice.
flavor_text: "Okay, Pumbaa—hit it!"

name: Tinker Bell
text:
FLURRY OF DELIGHT While you have 4 or more cards in your hand, this character gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
SPECTACULAR FIND While you have 7 or more cards in your hand, this character gets +3 {L}.

name: Tinker Bell
text:
FLURRY OF DELIGHT While you have 4 or more cards in your hand, this character gains Evasive. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
SPECTACULAR FIND While you have 7 or more cards in your hand, this character gets +3 {L}.

name: Stitch
text: AMPED UP While you have a character named Lilo in play, this character gains Challenger +3. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)
flavor_text:
"No more caffeine for you."
–Lilo

name: Scrooge McDuck
text:
BACKUP PLAN When you play this character, draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
ON THE MOVE When this character is challenged, return this card to your hand. (No damage is dealt in that challenge.)

name: Belle
text: WHAT A MESS During your turn, you may banish chosen item of yours to play this character for free.
flavor_text: Helping her dad keep the flying debris to a minimum.

name: Mulan
text: WHERE DO I SIGN IN? When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
flavor_text:
"Okay this is it, time to show 'em your man walk."
—Mushu

name: Goofy
text: FAMILY VACATION Once during your turn, whenever this character moves to a location, you may move one of your other characters to that location for free. If you do, draw a card.

name: Beast
text: FULL DANCE CARD Your Princess characters get +1 {S} and +1 {W}.
flavor_text: His heart warmed as the music began and the dancers took their places.

name: Belle
text:
Shift 3 (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Belle.)
ENHANCED HEALING When you play this character, move up to 3 damage counters from chosen character to chosen opposing character.
flavor_text: The mixed ink had changed more than just the rose.

name: Stitch
text: BRING YOUR FRIENDS Whenever this character quests, if you have 2 or more other characters in play, you may draw a card.
flavor_text:
"First one down the mountain gets all the marshmallows for their cocoa!"
—Lilo

name: Ariel
text: FAMILIAR GROUND Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen opposing character can't challenge and must quest during their next turn if able.
flavor_text: "Isn't it wonderful? See if there's anything that catches your eye."

name: Maleficent
text: HEED MY WORDS Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may exert chosen opposing character.
flavor_text: "Bind this glimmer, fiendish flowers!"

name: Cruella De Vil
text: YOU'RE OUT OF FASHION Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may banish chosen damaged character.
flavor_text: "Can I help you? Not with your sense of style, darling."

name: Queen Of Hearts
text: ROYAL COMMAND Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they’re played.)
flavor_text: Hours of walking in the heat had not improved her rosy disposition.

name: Cinderella
text: THIS AND THAT Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.
flavor_text: No matter how difficult the journey, she always takes care of her friends.

name: Pocahontas
text: WANDERING SPIRIT Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, return a location card from your discard to your hand.
flavor_text:
"Sometimes the right path is not the easiest one."
—Grandmother Willow
